top3.sql:
SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'
    ORDER BY AvgScrRead ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    WHERE AvgScrRead = (
        SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead)
        FROM satscores
        WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'
    )
)

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'
    ORDER BY AvgScrRead ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
WHERE sc.dname = 'Fresno Unified'
ORDER BY sc.AvgScrRead ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    WHERE AvgScrRead = (
        SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead)
        FROM satscores
        WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'
    )
)

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'
    ORDER BY AvgScrRead ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT s.Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
WHERE sc.dname = 'Fresno Unified'
  AND sc.AvgScrRead = (
    SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'
  );

SELECT Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
WHERE sc.dname = 'Fresno Unified'
ORDER BY sc.AvgScrRead ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'
    ORDER BY AvgScrRead ASC
    LIMIT 1
);
